profile.name: CHE AMAH DILAND NGWA
profile.bio:
I am a Software Engineer and Chief Operating Officer at SAMITECH Corporation, focused on building high-impact, scalable solutions. Currently pursuing my Higher National Diploma in Software Engineering, I specialize in bridging technical execution with efficient operational strategy.

My expertise is rooted in the Python ecosystem, where I develop robust backend infrastructures and SaaS platforms. I am particularly interested in architectural challenges like data synchronization and system resilience. My design philosophy balances clean, logic-driven interfaces with high-performance server-side logic, turning conceptual ideas into market-ready products.
